disclaimers: Tanzania customs/tax stage and first-registration stage are deliberately separated.
Used vehicle age excise must be confirmed against the latest TRA tariff and vehicle classification.
Motorcycle age logic can be added through the same age-based component structure.

faqs.question: Why does Tanzania show customs and registration separately?
faqs.answer: TRA import taxes and local first-registration fees happen at different stages. Keeping them separate makes it easier to budget for clearing versus getting the car road-ready.

faqs.question: Does this support used motorcycle age logic?
faqs.answer: The rules engine already supports age-based and vehicle-class conditions, so a motorcycle branch can be added in data without changing the pipeline.

copy.intro: Estimate a Tanzania vehicle import through Dar es Salaam with customs taxes, used-vehicle age excise, local registration tax, motor vehicle licence fee, and inland delivery.
copy.hiddenCosts: The costs people miss are first-registration levy blocks, age-based excise, port storage, clearing fees, and inland delivery beyond Dar es Salaam.
